title: Selaginella distorta
taxonomy: Selaginella distorta is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It belongs to the order Selaginellales, which is a group of vascular plants that are commonly known as spikemosses. The family Selaginellaceae is part of the division Lycopodiophyta, which also includes other lycopod species such as club mosses and quillworts. The division Lycopodiophyta is an ancient group of plants that dates back to the Devonian period. As a result, Selaginella distorta is classified as a vascular plant with a distinct evolutionary history.
